reasoning: The document demonstrates high quality with a composite fidelity score of 0.9727 and strong programmatic alignment (0.982 recall/precision). Identified issues, specifically the flattening of a multi-level list and the rendering of hyperlinks as plain text, are categorized as minor cosmetic/structural defects that do not justify a human review cycle for a short agenda document.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains a multi-level list within the second column of row 8 of the table ('8. Committee Reports'). In the JSON output, this list has been flattened into a single text block with newline characters and bullet characters ('•', 'o') instead of being structured as a semantic list or nested list items. This results in the loss of list item segmentation.
